name: The common room at the Silver Arrow
description:
As you finally reach the top of the ladder you find that the inn is almost
entirely empty!  A shaky and scared elf sings, and the several patrons that
have decided to come are all sitting as far apart from each other as possible,
avoiding any attempts at communication.  It seems the siege has taken its toll
on the city.  Even the barmaid seems scared of what might happen soon.
